mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coach_health_fitness WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY record_date DESC
SELECT * FROM coach_health_fitness WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND record_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY record_date DESC
SELECT * FROM coach_health_fitness WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY record_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM coach_health_fitness WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND record_date = #{recordDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coach_health_fitness (coach_id, record_date, weight, body_fat_rate, heart_rate, training_hours, calories_burned, muscle_mass, bmi, strength_score, endurance_score, flexibility_score, speed_score, coordination_score) VALUES (#{coachId}, #{recordDate}, #{weight}, #{bodyFatRate}, #{heartRate}, #{trainingHours}, #{caloriesBurned}, #{muscleMass}, #{bmi}, #{strengthScore}, #{enduranceScore}, #{flexibilityScore}, #{speedScore}, #{coordinationScore})
